text:
"YOSHIYUKI SADAMOTO WORKING MUSIC CD" is a compilation album by Mike Furuhata, it was bundled with the volume 14 of the Neon Genesis Evangelion Limited edition on 20 November 2014 by Kadokawa. The cover was illustrated by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto. The catalog number is NEOBK-1660839.
 https://www.discogs.com/release/6380982-Furuhata-Mike-Yoshiyuki-Sadamoto-Working-Music-CD
